name: agi-blog-automation
description: Framework Unificado de Qualidade (UQF) - Testes E2E, API e Performance
author: Eduardo Lima de Sousa

scripts.report:full: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'allure-results') { Get-ChildItem 'allure-results' -Exclude 'history' | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force }" && npx playwright test && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File allure-metadata.ps1 && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx allure open allure-report
